summary: Defined the iterative Fibonacci contract in the planning document by specifying a narrow public interface of `iterative_fibonacci(n: int) -> int`, a single integer return value with `0 -> 0` and `1 -> 1` base cases, and required use of the shared validation helper before any loop logic. Marked only the `define-iterative-fibonacci-contract` task as completed in the task list.
tests_ran: rg -n "Iterative Fibonacci Contract|iterative_fibonacci\(n: int\) -> int|define-iterative-fibonacci-contract|\"status\": \"completed\"" Fibo_Codex/fibonacci_exploration_plan.md Fibo_Codex/fibonacci_task_list.json
